audit_basis: Frozen processed rows and prospective settlement identities that normalized to the same club identity within one competition domain; no cross-competition identity inference. USA_MLS LA aliases were added only after two already-frozen 2026-07-23 UTC fixtures failed unique ESPN settlement solely because the public scoreboard uses LA abbreviations while the frozen fixture identity uses Los Angeles names; external completed-match evidence independently confirmed the same clubs and fixtures.
description: Explicit source-name aliases added only after inspecting frozen source rows or auditable prospective identity mismatches. Each mapping joins spelling, capitalization, legal-suffix or established source abbreviation variants of the same club.
